scripts.db:migrate:stage: wrangler d1 migrations apply mango-hsu-stage --remote --env stage
scripts.db:export:prod: mkdir -p backups && wrangler d1 export mango-hsu-prod --remote --output=backups/mango-$(date +%Y%m%d).sqlite
scripts.deploy:stage: astro build && bun run scripts/deploy.mjs stage
scripts.deploy:prod: astro build && bun run scripts/deploy.mjs prod
